---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who experiences it?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Other solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, or related issues.

---

> **Note:** For large features (new domain, breaking API change, new storage provider), please open a [GitHub Discussion](https://github.com/douglas-prado/alexandria/discussions) with the `RFC` label before filing an issue. This avoids duplicate work and gets earlier feedback.
